= values

Returns an array of all values from an object

== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.foo_vals = this.foo.values().sort()

# In:  {"foo":{"bar":1,"baz":2}}
# Out: {"foo_vals":[1,2]}
----

Find max value in object:

[,bloblang]
----
root.max = this.scores.values().sort().index(-1)

# In:  {"scores":{"player1":85,"player2":92,"player3":78}}
# Out: {"max":92}
----
